zh.lifeSummary: 當William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth於1426年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，他的父親William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth23歲，母親Alice Saint Maur24歲。他於1444年與Katherine Lenthall在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth于1426年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，他的父亲William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth23岁，母亲Alice Saint Maur24岁。他于1444年与Katherine Lenthall在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1467年在他的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth was born in 1426, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, his father, William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth, was 23 and his mother, Alice Saint Maur, was 24. He married Katherine Lenthall in 1444, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1467, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth est né en 1426, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Saint Maur, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Lenthall en 1444, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1467, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth 1426 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth 23 und seine Mutter Alice Saint Maur 24. Er hat 1444 in England Katherine Lenthall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1467 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth è nato il nel 1426 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice Saint Maur, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Lenthall nel 1444, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1467, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworthが1426年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworthは23歳，母Alice Saint Maurは24歳であった。1444年にイギリスでKatherine Lenthallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth(이)가 1426년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Saint Maur(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1444년 영국에서 Katherine Lenthall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth nasceu em 1426, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Saint Maur, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Lenthall em 1444, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1467, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth родился в 1426 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Saint Maur, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Lenthall в 1444 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1467 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William La Zouche 6th Lord of Haryngworth nació en 1426, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William 5th Baron la Zouche of Haryngworth, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Saint Maur, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Katherine Lenthall en 1444, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1467, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
